text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Gold City's running today. I can't wait to see how
she does against the senior racers.

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Oh please, you're just here to ogle at her pretty
face, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Is it that obvious? I'm excited to see how she
does, but really I just wanted to see her in person.
Same for you, right?

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Nah, I'm cheering for Tamamo Cross. Did you see
that race she won by a huge margin?

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! She's so good, it's scary! I wonder how she'll
do today?
choice_data_list: Keep an eye on City's running too!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Whoa, who are you?! Wait... Gold City?!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: Wow, she's just so pretty...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Thank you. That's enough, Trainer. Let's go.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I said let's go.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: So Tamamo got past her wall then. Good for her.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But for me, it's still all about my looks...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'm fine. Need to concentrate on my running.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: So just... don't say anything.

The comments she heard aren't the whole picture.
The fans are excited to see her running, too. But
hearing that wouldn't be much comfort to her
right now, so instead...
choice_data_list: Just keep your head up and run like yourself.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I've been waitin' for this, City! We finally get to
race each other!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
This moment's been a long time comin'. You've
had a lotta success gettin' here, but that all ends
today.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
It's my job to knock ya back to reality! Don't go
cryin' 'cause I'm too strong when dis is over!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: As if I'd cry...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I dunno if somethin' happened, but ya seem
pretty unmotivated for someone gettin' ready to
race.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Somethin' goin' on? Is it just me?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hey! Stop lookin' so grim!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You better not half-ass it out there, 'kay? And
don't get in my way either!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't go out there if it was just to make a
fool of myself.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: If there's still a chance...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Then I have to.
